name: AOP Observability Bridge
description: Bridges upstream plugin hooks and diagnostic events to the AOP Server for fleet-wide observability

nodeName.description: This node's fleet ID for event attribution

flushIntervalMs.description: Max time between flushes in ms (default: 5000)

aopServerUrl.label: AOP Server URL
aopServerUrl.help: HTTP endpoint for the AOP event ingestion server
